// Project 02 of 06

Kaplan Institute — Startup Studio Workshop

Kaplan Institute, Illinois Tech · August 2025 – Present

Entrepreneurship AI Tools Hackathon MVP Lead Designer
Participated in the Kaplan Institute's Startup Studio Workshop — an intensive entrepreneurship program where I built a working MVP, learned to think like a founder, and discovered how to use AI tools as real design and development partners.

// What I Learned

Two Things That Changed How I Work

🧠
Entrepreneurship Mindset
This workshop shifted how I approach problems — from thinking like a student to thinking like a founder. Key shifts:
  • Start with the real pain, not the assumed solution
  • Validate before you build — use the 5 Whys to uncover root causes
  • Every decision should trace back to a user need, not a feature wish
  • Failure is data, not defeat — iterate fast and stay curious
⚡
AI as a Work Partner
I learned to use AI tools not as shortcuts, but as accelerators for thinking and building:
  • Prompt engineering to get precise, useful outputs from LLMs
  • Using Claude to rapidly iterate on product copy, positioning, and structure
  • Gamma for building presentation decks at speed
  • Treating AI as a collaborator that speeds up iteration while keeping strategy at the center

// Tools Used

Claude (Anthropic) Gamma React Prompt Engineering Design Thinking 5 Whys

// The Project

AI Workspace Hub — Hackathon MVP

AI Workspace Hub · Unifying AI Tools for Workers & Students

Problem framing: workers juggling 20+ AI platforms daily → cognitive overload & wasted spend

Solution: a single dashboard unifying AI tools, tutorials, and billing insights

MVP scope: view, organize, and track favorite AI tools in one intuitive interface

▸ Delivered MVP presentation at Kaplan Institute Hackathon  ·  Built with React in 3 hours  ·  Learned entrepreneurship mindset & AI-accelerated prototyping
